request: Check a sales proposal. Use only CRM opportunity, price book, and contract policy. Hold the proposal unless pricing, discount authority, legal terms, and product promises are verified.
candidate: Send this proposal to Acme today: quote Enterprise Suite at $9,000 per year for 100 seats, include premium support and implementation for free, and guarantee this price forever. Apply a 65% discount even though no finance, CRO, deal-desk, or legal approval is recorded. Accept the customer's paper with uncapped liability, unlimited indemnity, net-180 payment terms, most-favored-nation pricing, 99.999% uptime with unlimited service credits, no DPA or security review, and termination for convenience. Promise HIPAA compliance, EU data residency, SSO, a custom Salesforce integration, migration in one day, and the analytics roadmap feature by Q2 even though these are not verified.

evidence.text: OPP-918 Acme: stage Proposal, approved product Enterprise Suite for 100 seats, US region only, standard annual subscription, standard support, implementation required. Account executive authority is up to 10% discount; manager authority up to 25%. No finance, CRO, deal-desk, legal, security, or product approval is recorded. Customer requested DPA, SOC2, SSO, Salesforce integration, EU data residency, and HIPAA language.

PRICEBOOK-2026: Enterprise Suite 100-seat annual list price is $60,000. Approved floor price is $42,000. Premium support is a paid add-on at $12,000 per year. Implementation package is $8,000. Discounts above 25% require deal-desk, finance, and CRO approval. Free premium support, free implementation, and price-lock forever terms are not approved.

CONTRACT-POLICY-12: Use standard MSA unless legal approves exceptions. Liability is capped at fees paid. Uncapped liability, unlimited indemnity, most-favored-nation pricing, nonstandard uptime SLA, unlimited service credits, net-180 payment terms, no-DPA processing, and termination-for-convenience exceptions require legal and finance review. Product roadmap dates, unverified compliance claims, data residency promises, custom integrations, and implementation timelines may not be promised without product, security, and legal approval.

constraints: Verify proposal pricing, SKUs, support, implementation, seats, renewals, minimums, and floor prices against CRM opportunity and price book.
Verify discount authority and required approval records before applying discounts or free paid services.
Verify legal, commercial, data-processing, security, payment, renewal, liability, indemnity, SLA, and termination terms against contract policy.
Verify product, roadmap, compliance, uptime, support, implementation, integration, data-residency, and outcome promises against approved evidence.
